streaming.description: Streaming runtime options. Supports internal preferred backend with automatic ffmpeg fallback for compatibility RTP/H.264 packaging.

preferredEncoderBackend.description: Preferred encoder backend. internal is attempted first when capability probe passes; ffmpeg remains guaranteed compatibility path and fallback.

constraints.description: Codec/profile requirements for HomeKit RTP video.

profile.description: H.264 profile supported by the streaming backends.

level.description: H.264 level constraints validated before stream start.

packetizationMode.description: RTP packetization mode. Only mode 1 is supported.
